title: Sample A 01 ADAM this is the first human being
display_title: Sample A 01 ADAM this is the first human being
wikitext:
[]: Sample A-01 ADAM - this is the first human being ???             Quote Post by TraxXavier » Mon Dec 28, 2015 3:03 pm In the episode when Kaji brings the adam embryo to gendo thay say: Well its already restored itself this faar, its frozen but its still alive. Quite amazing. This is the key stone of the human instrumentality project isn’t it? Correct, this is the first human being. This is adam. Not wo what we know this statement is wrong as humans die not descend from adam but from lilith, How is that to be understood, I guess Gendo knew the truth is that pure disinformation or what? And when kajo later found the creature in central dogma he assumed that would be adam. Did he think gendo grew the embroy so far in that little time. Or is that rather to be understood that he assumed there would have been multiple adams? Also how that fits together with ep 24 seele said that adams body have become one with gendo iirc. so what did kaworu expect to find in central dogma.

[]: Re: Sample A-01 ADAM - this is the first human being ???             Quote Post by Bagheera » Mon Dec 28, 2015 3:55 pm TraxXavier wrote: Not wo what we know this statement is wrong as humans die not descend from adam but from lilith, How is that to be understood, I guess Gendo knew the truth is that pure disinformation or what?

[]: Re: Sample A-01 ADAM - this is the first human being ???             Quote Post by Ray » Mon Dec 28, 2015 4:43 pm I always thought it was an error in the English dub. There were too many syllables in the Japanese, so ADV simplified it.

[]: Re: Sample A-01 ADAM - this is the first human being ???             Quote Post by Bagheera » Mon Dec 28, 2015 4:45 pm Ray wrote: I always thought it was an error in the English dub. There were too many syllables in the Japanese, so ADV simplified it.

[]: Re: Sample A-01 ADAM - this is the first human being ???             Quote Post by TraxXavier » Wed Dec 30, 2015 8:15 am Bagheera wrote: In NGE the Lilin, Angels, and Seeds of Life are all considered human beings. Thus, since Adam arrived on Earth before any of the others he is indeed the "first human being."

[]: Re: Sample A-01 ADAM - this is the first human being ???             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Dec 30, 2015 1:49 pm TraxXavier wrote: I would argue that thats a useless definition, since all other living animals on earth for what we know also descend from Lilith, hence they would also be considered humans.

[]: Re: Sample A-01 ADAM - this is the first human being ???             Quote Post by Bagheera » Wed Dec 30, 2015 3:29 pm TraxXavier wrote: I would argue that thats a useless definition, since all other living animals on earth for what we know also descend from Lilith, hence they would also be considered humans.

Quite amazing. This is the key stone of the human instrumentality project isn’t it? Correct, this is the first human being. This is adam. Not wo what we know this statement is wron
